prompt: In image 1, replace the Wi-Fi icon in the top right corner with the 'No Wi-Fi' icon from image 2, keeping the same size and placement. Add the volume slider from image 3 at the bottom of the screen, just above the orange 'Next' button. Make sure the rest of the UI stays the same.

All other UI elements in image 1 must remain unchanged.
